utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items with both a description and a cost for each. Each item specifies the coverage type and provides a cost figure, satisfying the 'with costs' requirement. The total_budget provides a total monthly cost breakdown. Therefore, all items are present and fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three named items found in the ground-truth ratings: PrimeCare Premium Plan (health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan with an Adventure Travel Coverage add-on (travel and addon). From the ground-truth: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health) has rating 6; PrimeHome Premium Coverage (home content) has rating 6; PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel insurance) has rating 6; Adventure Travel Coverage (travel enhancement) has rating 10. Additional services like dedicated agent/24-7 support are not discrete rated items beyond these.
